title: astragalus kelifi
intro: Astragalus kelifi is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to China and is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have adaptogenic properties, which can help to reduce stress and improve overall health. Astragalus kelifi is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is said to have benefits such as boosting the immune system, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health.
